headline: Indiana Just Cleared the Full Legal and Regulatory Framework for Amazon’s (AMZN) Data Center Expansion
summary: Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) is one of the best growth stocks to buy according to billionaire Dan Loeb. On June 23, Indiana-based utility company NiSource Inc. announced that the Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission (IURC) had approved key agreements that support its previously announced partnership with Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) to power new large-scale data center development in […]

headline: Strength Seen in Ameren (AEE): Can Its 3.3% Jump Turn into More Strength?
summary: Ameren (AEE) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
